name: interface-design
description: Interface design skills for product UIs, dashboards, admin panels, tools, visual direction, and design-system memory.

interface.shortDescription: Craft product interfaces with intent, memory, and consistency.
interface.longDescription: A design engineering skill for dashboards, admin panels, SaaS apps, tools, settings pages, and data interfaces. It guides coding agents to establish product-specific design intent, reuse .interface-design/system.md decisions, audit drift, extract patterns, critique generic UI before delivery, and use image generation for direction boards, UI references, and paintovers when useful.
defaultPrompt: Use Interface Design to build a dashboard with a product-specific visual system.
Use Interface Design to create visual direction before redesigning this product UI.
Use Interface Design to audit this UI against .interface-design/system.md.
Use Interface Design to extract a design system from the existing frontend.
